hero.title: UltraFans
hero.subtitle: Where sports fans unlock real experiences
hero.successSubtitle: We'll be in touch before kickoff.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Zero complexity. Maximum fandom.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Buy your club's fan credits and become a verified supporter. Every purchase goes directly to the team you love.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Stake your fan credits to start earning loyalty points every day. The longer you hold, the more points you stack.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Spend your points in live auctions for real-world rewards: VIP match tickets, signed shirts, travel with the squad, and meet-the-player sessions.

fan.title: Your team. Your stake.
fan.desc: Buy your club's fan credits with a card in seconds — no complexity. Hold more credits, earn more points daily. Your balance is your rank in the fan hierarchy.

staking.title: Hold to earn. Earn to win.
staking.desc: Stake your fan credits to generate loyalty points automatically. Points don't expire — they stack up waiting for the next auction. The more committed, the bigger your war chest.

auction.title: One winner. Real rewards.
auction.desc: Bid your points in live auctions for experiences money can't normally buy: VIP match tickets, signed shirts, travel with the squad, or a private meet-and-greet.

sports.title: Your favorite sport teams
sports.subtitle: Earn real experiences with more sports and more rewards.
sports.footballTagline: From local matches to cup finals.
sports.hockeyTagline: From the rink to the roster.

socialProof.testimonial1Quote: I staked credits on my club and won a signed shirt from a live auction. Wildest Tuesday ever.
socialProof.testimonial2Quote: Courtside tickets through loyalty points? Not a single dollar spent beyond my fan credits. This is unreal.
socialProof.testimonial3Quote: I've been supporting my team for years. Finally a platform that lets me prove it and get rewarded for it.

partner.subtitle: Everything you need to connect with your ultrafans and create unforgettable experiences.
partner.prop1Title: Your own fan credit, live in a day
partner.prop1Desc: Issue your team's fan credit with one click. Set supply, manage distribution — we handle all the infrastructure. No technical team required.
partner.prop2Desc: Connect to all your ultrafans in one dashboard. Know who your most committed supporters actually are, not just your biggest social media accounts.
partner.prop3Title: Run real experiences, not just content
partner.prop3Desc: Create auction experiences directly from your admin panel — add a date, location, and number of seats.
partner.getInTouch: Are you a club ? Get in touch with us
